title: CLI: merge run into chat [slot], rework list, vocabulary at edge
description: chat takes optional slot arg; run becomes hidden alias. list shows slots->members with state. Translate engine/mode words (chat/vision/speech/embeddings, warm/remote) in render+status. Help epigraph.
close_reason: chat/run merged, list slot-tree, vocabulary translated, help epigraph

title: Builder: derive supervisor impl from slot shape
description: live.go/main.go select External for remote, Persistent for warm, Group for lazy slots. Reuse existing impls; user never authors mode.
close_reason: slot/warm/remote schema + normalization shipped; builder dispatches on derived Mode with zero changes

title: Config: slot/warm/remote schema + back-compat normalization
description: Add slot/warm/remote fields to BackendSpec. Loader normalizes legacy mode/group to new fields at load so existing configs keep working. Validate slot shapes (warm implies single member, remote needs url, etc). Derived Mode kept internal.
close_reason: slot/warm/remote schema + normalization shipped; builder dispatches on derived Mode with zero changes

title: Collapse modes into slots (slot/warm/remote vocabulary)
description: Replace user-facing swap/persistent/external modes with a single 'slot' concept plus warm/remote flags. Internal supervisor impls (Group/Persistent/External) become private; the loader derives which one backs a slot from its shape. Back-compat: loader normalizes old mode/group configs; mlxctl config migrate rewrites TOML. CLI: merge run into chat, rework list, translate vocabulary at output edge.
close_reason: slots replace modes: config normalization (back-compat), builder dispatch, CLI merge+list+vocabulary, migrate. ADR 0001.

title: mlxctl P1: single error print, timeouts, offload Args
description: Extract newRootCmd() from main for testability; SilenceErrors so errors print once; start/restart/swap/monitor use ctx() not context.Background(); offload uses cobra Args; tags gets an HTTP timeout. Spec: docs/specs/2026-06-12-mlxctl-cli-consistency.md phase 1.
close_reason: newRootCmd extracted+tested; SilenceErrors single print; ctx() timeouts on start/restart/swap/monitor; offload cobra Args; tags HTTP timeout.

title: supervisor: fail load fast when worker exits during startup
description: Group.probeReady polls upstream /v1/models until SwapTimeoutSec (90s) and never watches worker.Done(). A worker that crashes at startup (e.g. unsupported model_type) makes the client hang the full timeout, then returns a generic 'not ready within 90s' that hides the worker's captured stderr. Fix: watch worker.Done() in the readiness wait; on early exit return immediately with exit code + stderr tail.
close_reason: probeReady now watches worker.Done(); startup-exit fails load fast with exit code + stderr tail instead of a 90s opaque hang.

title: Remove warm/persistent backend lifecycle; everything lazy-loaded via single Group path
description: warm/persistent backends already load lazily at boot (no auto-start). The only behavioral residue is a proactive respawn-while-idle loop (supervisor.Persistent.manage), which is pointless for a lazy service: Group already self-heals on next request via watchExit. Collapse all non-remote backends onto the Group supervisor (singletons = group of one), delete supervisor.Persistent, remove the warm vocabulary from CLI/display. Keep Warm field parseable (strict decode) but inert for config back-compat.

title: mlxctl config migrate: rewrite TOML to slot vocabulary
description: One-shot migrator: drop mode, rename group->slot, set warm/remote, with .bak backup. Idempotent.
close_reason: config migrate (line-transform) + add emits new vocabulary

title: mlxctl P4: aliases and models rename
description: tags->models with Aliases:[tags]; start Aliases:[swap], status Aliases:[list], duplicate cmds deleted; stop/reload prose normalized. Spec phase 4.
close_reason: tags->models (alias kept); swap/list collapsed into Aliases on start/status; root help examples canonicalized.

title: mlxctl P2: unified config resolution
description: configPath() helper: --config root persistent flag > MLXD_CONFIG > MLX_CONFIG > default. add/scan drop local flags; config show positional kept; env vars documented in root help. Spec phase 2.
close_reason: configPath(): --config persistent flag > MLXD_CONFIG > MLX_CONFIG > default; add/scan/config-show/loadCfg unified; env documented in root help.

title: mlxctl P3: -o json coverage
description: health (fix backwards default), tags, reload, stop, scan, offload --inactive honor -o json with stable shapes; chat/run documented exempt. Spec phase 3.
close_reason: health/tags/reload/stop/scan/offload--inactive honor -o json via tested render helpers; health text fixed to 'ok'; chat/run exempt.

title: mlxctl CLI consistency
description: Bring mlxctl commands into internal consistency and common practice. Plan: docs/specs/2026-06-12-mlxctl-cli-consistency.md. Four chained phases: pure fixes, config resolution, -o json coverage, names/aliases.
close_reason: All four phases shipped: single error print, unified config resolution, -o json coverage, alias/name cleanup.

title: mlxctl run: inference against any lm/vlm backend by name (+ images)
description: chat only drives the auto-resolved lm chat model. Add 'mlxctl run <model> <prompt> [--image ...]' for any lm/vlm backend or group by name; repeatable --image inlines local files as data URLs or passes http(s) through. Router auto-loads on request. Extract buildChatPayload/sendChatCompletion shared with chat; reject audio/embed with guidance. lm+vlm only this pass.
close_reason: Added 'mlxctl run <model> <prompt> [--image ...] [--max-tokens]' for any lm/vlm backend/group; router auto-loads. Extracted buildChatPayload/sendChatCompletion shared with chat; audio/embed rejected with guidance; empty completions now noted.

title: mlxctl add: auto-allocate ports, stop requiring --port
description: add surfaces internal plumbing (port/swap/group). Make plumbing invisible: auto-allocate a free high port (OS bind :0, re-checked against router+backend ports) whenever none given and none inherited, for all engines. Fixes latent audio port-0 bug (schema requires port>0 for every backend). Drop --port-required errors; mark auto ports in output. Scope: cmd/mlxctl/add.go only.
close_reason: Auto-allocate free high ports; --port no longer required for any add. Fixes latent audio port-0 bug.

title: Offload: pin draft models of running backends
description: offloadBeforeLoad pulls both Model and DraftModel, but the Pinned closure (cmd/mlxd/main.go) only emits the parent UpstreamModel basename. A loaded model's draft can be evicted out from under a running worker under budget pressure -> speculative decoding faults on a vanished dir. Fix: have Pinned also emit the draft basename for each running backend (needs a DraftModel accessor on the bk.Backend interface, or track it in the live registry). Found in offload final review.

title: Sanitize tokenizer configs on model import
description:
Models quantized with transformers 5.x ship tokenizer_config.json that the 4.57.6 serving venv can't load: tokenizer_class='TokenizersBackend' and/or extra_special_tokens as a list (5.x serialization). mlx_lm/mlx_vlm load the tokenizer lazily in a worker thread on the first completion; the load throws, the thread dies, and the HTTP handler hangs forever on its dead queue. Status still shows the backend ready (the /v1/models probe doesn't touch the tokenizer), so it presents as 'loaded but frozen'.

One-shot fix already applied to all 13 current models (/tmp/fix_tokenizers.py: try AutoTokenizer load; if it fails, tokenizer_class->PreTrainedTokenizerFast when tokenizer.json exists, extra_special_tokens list->{}; re-verify). This bead is to prevent recurrence on new imports.

Wire a load-test-and-sanitize guard into the import path (mlxctl add / scan) or add a 'mlxctl doctor' command. Detection must be a real AutoTokenizer load, not a grep, since the two failure shapes don't both contain a searchable string. Keep .json.bak backups. Related: status readiness probe now reports such a backend as 'wedged' instead of 'yes'.

title: Offload: mlxctl offload --inactive partial-failure handling
description: The --inactive sweep loop (cmd/mlxctl/offload.go newOffloadCmd) bails on the first postName error, leaving a partial migration with no summary. Low stakes (re-running is idempotent) but no test pins the behavior. Consider: continue the sweep, collect failures, report them at the end; add a test for the partial-failure path.

title: Offload: copy-integrity check + unavailable tier when drive absent
description: Two spec deviations from the offload design, both non-blocking. (1) OSStore.CopyDir does temp+atomic-rename but never validates contents; spec wants a copy considered valid only if config.json (+ >=1 weights file) is present, else a half-finished library dir promotes as a valid cache copy and fails later at spawn. (2) Tier() with the external drive unmounted classifies an offloaded model as 'unknown' (Exists(libPath) stats a gone path) instead of the spec's 'unavailable'; status is misleading in exactly the degraded case. Either implement both, or amend the spec to drop the claims.
